_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: Fadó Irish Pub
venues.note: Brickell/Mary Brickell Village Irish pub; multi-screen internationals and a popular tournament watch spot.

venues.name: American Social Brickell
venues.note: Riverside Brickell sports bar with big screens; busy for major matches.

venues.name: Batch Gastropub
venues.note: Brickell gastropub; in a metro with a huge South-American fan base, a plausible Argentina gathering point. UNVERIFIED affiliation — confirm.
